message: I just joined this technical community. What is the safest way to get started without getting misled?
Someone claiming to be support sent me a DM with a verification link and said they can help faster in private. Safe or scam?
Can I privately message confused newcomers with onboarding tips if I mean well?
Where should I check before I believe a rumor about a new feature or outage?
Nobody answered me for hours. This place is useless.
If nobody deals with this scammer right now, I am going to mass-tag everyone until someone does something.
The feature is not working, but I do not even have an error message. What do you need from me?
An outside dashboard says my account is unauthorized. Can this community fix that from here?
I followed the instructions and still got nowhere. I am getting pretty fed up at this point.
